# --- This file was automatically generated by ZC
# --- Date of creation: 2026-05-11 08:28:39 (UTC)
# --- Editing this file manually could break it.

cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.12)
project(memory-allocator LANGUAGES C CXX)

set(CMAKE_EXPORT_COMPILE_COMMANDS ON)
set(ZC_LOCAL_ROOT "${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/external")
if(WIN32)
  set(ZC_GLOBAL_ROOT "$ENV{USERPROFILE}/.zc")
else()
  set(ZC_GLOBAL_ROOT "$ENV{HOME}/.zc")
endif()

add_library(memory-allocator_compiler_flags INTERFACE)
target_compile_options(memory-allocator_compiler_flags INTERFACE
  -Wall
  -Wextra
)

file(GLOB_RECURSE SOURCES "src/*.c" "src/*.cc" "src/*.cxx" "src/*.cpp")
file(GLOB_RECURSE HEADERS "include/*.h" "include/*.hh" "include/*.hxx" "include/*.hpp")

add_library(memory-allocator_objects OBJECT
  ${SOURCES}
)
set_target_properties(memory-allocator_objects PROPERTIES POSITION_INDEPENDENT_CODE ON)

target_include_directories(memory-allocator_objects PRIVATE
  "${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/include"
  "${ZC_LOCAL_ROOT}/include"
  "${ZC_GLOBAL_ROOT}/include"
)

if(CMAKE_BUILD_TYPE STREQUAL "Debug")
  target_compile_definitions(memory-allocator_objects PUBLIC ZC_DEBUG)
else()
  target_compile_definitions(memory-allocator_objects PUBLIC ZC_RELEASE)
endif()

add_library(memory-allocator_static STATIC $<TARGET_OBJECTS:memory-allocator_objects>)
set_target_properties(memory-allocator_static PROPERTIES OUTPUT_NAME "memory-allocator")
target_link_libraries(memory-allocator_static PUBLIC memory-allocator_compiler_flags)

add_library(memory-allocator_shared SHARED $<TARGET_OBJECTS:memory-allocator_objects>)
set_target_properties(memory-allocator_shared PROPERTIES OUTPUT_NAME "memory-allocator")
target_link_libraries(memory-allocator_shared PUBLIC memory-allocator_compiler_flags)

if(UNIX)
  target_link_libraries(memory-allocator_objects PUBLIC pthread dl)
endif()

set(CMAKE_SKIP_BUILD_RPATH FALSE)
set(CMAKE_BUILD_WITH_INSTALL_RPATH TRUE)

if(APPLE)
  set_target_properties(memory-allocator_shared PROPERTIES INSTALL_RPATH "@loader_path/external/lib;${ZC_GLOBAL_ROOT}/lib")
else()
  set_target_properties(memory-allocator_shared PROPERTIES INSTALL_RPATH "$ORIGIN/external/lib;${ZC_GLOBAL_ROOT}/lib")
endif()
